hero_subtitle: SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk signals into a unified workflow that helps compliance teams monitor and rescreen customers when risk profiles or policies change.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Rescreening delays risk response and auditability
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to keep rescreening aligned with evolving risk signals and policy updates due to fragmented data and disconnected provider outputs. This leads to slower customer risk reassessment, inconsistent audit trails, and increased operational workload for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects evolving risk signals, updated provider checks, policy changes and review actions into one audit-ready rescreening workflow for VASPs to manage risk reassessment and compliance evidence efficiently.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to ongoing rescreening
workflow_description: SFTY connects initial KYC and KYB provider checks with ongoing risk signals to manage customer rescreening, cases, decisions and audit evidence systematically.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured review workflows, decisions, cases and evidence to support ongoing customer rescreening and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with managed rescreening workflows that support audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration and controlled deployment for bank and regulatory due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for customer rescreening?
faq_1_answer: SFTY supports ongoing customer rescreening by connecting risk signals, regulatory updates and policies into structured review workflows for timely and auditable identity and corporate due diligence updates.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle onboarding risk reviews?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes screening outputs and risk alerts into dynamic onboarding workflows that include risk-based routing, case creation and review escalation based on rules triggered by new or updated risk indicators.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding decision evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves a full audit trail of onboarding decisions, reviewer actions, triggered rules and supporting evidence for regulatory review and internal governance purposes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple KYC and KYB providers, connecting their results into a consistent compliance workflow without disrupting existing vendor relationships or processes.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but organizes their outputs into structured workflows, cases, evidence and audit-ready reports to improve operational compliance and oversight.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB, sanctions and risk signals into controlled rescreening and audit-ready compliance cases.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
